name: to-do — meeting with Dana
description: A session's accumulated follow-ups. task-extract CONSTRAINS the meeting's distillates/moments into these items across drains; a draft UN-CONSTRAINS them via {{todo}}. Editable: a user PUTs an edited items array (e.g. the hand-added item below) and the next draft reflects it.

items.text: Send Dana the updated deck before Thursday
Confirm the ship date with the team
